title_native: 危険な森 おにごっこ
description:
Based on the erotic doujin game by x-rabbit (えっくす・らびっと).

In a certain deep forest, there is a girl walking alone. Her name is Alps. And this is a dangerous forest where many terrible creatures lurk. But Alps is frightened and goes on her way. To save her sick sister, she continues to walk out of the forest with a medicinal herb in her hand. Alps is still walking, "Wait for me. Sister". However, the forest is not as sweet as one's determination. A big monkey in heat forced her to sow her seed, and a boar attacked her with his huge body. Furthermore, she also encounters a group of men of dubious character.... The lone, dainty girl is nothing but food for the beasts. What will be the fate of Alps?... Alps wanders through a dangerous forest to save her sister. Her white soft skin emerges in the dimly lit forest. The huge body of a boar, a big monkey in heat, rests on it. A glossy pink color emerges on her heated body.

(Source: Getchu, translated)

description:
Lua is a saintess candidate who possesses the power of healing. But her ability had one flaw: she could only heal others by transferring their wounds onto herself. Because of this, others bullied her, calling her the "Fallen Saintess." But it didn't bother Lua because her best friend Arianne always stood up for her.

One day, Lua's crush, Commander Garrett, was on the brink of death from a beast attack. Lua healed him, which left her on the verge of death. When she woke up, she learned that all the credit was given to Arianne, and she finally saw her best friend's true color. Devastated, Lua is lost and helpless when the second prince appears in front of her with a tempting offer. What would happen to Lua as she begins her new life as a villainess?

description:
This film is based on an ancient legend of the Qiang, an ethnic minority living in the mountainous regions of southwest China. It tells the story of a monkey who grows up among humans and follows the footsteps of his mother, Awubaji, to the Holy Mountain to uncover the secret of warmth. After undergoing many hardships and dangers, the monkey manages to get hold of a fire stone. His fur burns off and he finally turns into a human being. The film is rendered in the style of traditional Chinese ink painting and poetically envisions life in a prehistoric society. The story of the fire thief addresses timeless themes, such as growth and companionship, which are still important today. With Ran Bi Wa, the legendary Shanghai Animation Film Studio, birthplace of many iconic Chinese animations, is celebrating a triumphant return.

(Source: Berlinale)

description:
A summer trip to the beach that she couldn't go to with her husband. Yumiko was excited and looking forward to this day. But when her husband can't come, she heads to the beach alone with her young son. Just as she's feeling down, two young men approach her. That night, Yumiko is invited to the room of the men who hit on her that day. She puts her son to bed and heads to the room where the two young men are waiting, with secret hope in her heart. A forbidden summer begins, as she is consumed by carnal desires despite being tormented by guilt...

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

title_native: 陛下わたしを忘れてください
description:
Marrying a cursed marquis changes her destiny... A superb romance of misunderstandings.

"I wanted to help you even if you didn't love me ."

Lunia, the daughter of the Count of Persephone, was shunned by her father and treated like a tool by her half-brother, leading a lonely life. Meanwhile, she is chosen by a priest to be engaged to Hades, the head of the Duke of Khronoa family, and decides to marry into the cursed duke family. The Duke of Khronoa, feared as the "King of the Underworld," is cursed with a short lifespan if he does not marry a bride chosen by the emperor. However, Hades tells Lunia that he has no intention of loving her.

"I exist only to break the curse..."

In order to keep Hades alive, Lunia deceived him and spent the night with him, then disappeared without realizing that she was pregnant with his child. Seven years later, Hades somehow managed to find Lunia and tried to take her back with the child...

(Source: Honto, translated)

description:
Ryoshuu no Mura
A group of female students are on their way to a high-altitude training camp for the astronomy club when their car gets a flat tire and they're stranded. A local person rescues them and invites them into the village. However, it turns out that the village has a tradition of capturing women from outside and forcing them into village marriages. A beautiful teacher risks her life to protect the students held captive in a storehouse, but when she's taken to a large hall, she finds the men stark naked and erect. With their clothes torn off and tortured relentlessly on the spot, her body reaches its limits. The teacher, losing her mind, offers up her students as scapegoats. Meanwhile, the three students left behind in the storehouse have their clothes stripped and their hands and feet bound. One by one, their bodies are trained by the villagers, until they are physically and mentally broken and reduced to human slaves.

(Source: Mediabank, translated)

title_english: Whereabouts of Tomorrow: Ashita no Arika
description:
“Ever since that day...I lost hope for the future.”

In 2021, Asumi, a salesperson at Kobe Steel, was having a difficult time finding meaning in her job while she felt helpless in the face of the company’s numerous issues.

Just as Asumi was about to tell her boss that she wanted to quit, a mystical ray of light came out of a corporate history book and led her to Kobe in 1905. There she encountered visionary, high-spirited people from Kobe Steel's founding period. Torasuke was among them; he was a clumsy but enthusiastic young man from the Meiji era who dreamed big and believed in the potential of industrial development.

Guided by the Kobelco Group's history, two persons from different eras set out on a journey across time, from its beginning to the present.

They witness people get through tough times and continue to take on challenges with hope for a better future.

After coming into contact with the founders’ spirits, they each choose their own path for the future.

(Source: Official KOBELCO Site)

description:
Some people developed extraordinary talents after waves of spiritual energy were released by enigmatic "Spiritual Ruins Gates" that arose all over the planet twenty years ago. Spirit Warriors, who possessed supernatural abilities, were the name given to these talented individuals.

Particularly after demonstrating their unparalleled strength during the devastating Beast Tide Disaster, the uncommon "Space series" fighters were the most elite among them.

From his early years, Jiang Nan, an orphan who grew up in Jiangcheng, Lingzhou, had aspirations of becoming the greatest Spirit Warrior. He awakens as Lingzhou's second-ever space-type warrior at the age of sixteen, with the rarest and most potent ability of all.

Here's where his incredible journey starts...

Yun Wangshu's wedding was meant to be the happiest day of her life, but a brutal conspiracy turned it into a nightmare, slaughtering her entire clan. After a narrow escape, she made a desperate deal with the Silent Court. Now, sixty years later, reborn as the merciless Xihe, she's ready to make her enemies bleed for everything they took from her.

description:
A collection of original short episodes based on stories created by light novel authors and illustrators.

Includes:
 • Shoushin Time Leap
 On her final Christmas in high school, Miri confesses to her classmate Takashi, but he rejects her. In her despair, she clings to a past diary. The diary envelops her in light, and Miri finds herself transported six months in the past. She uses this chance, and repeated time leaps, to try to change her future, and find out the reason why Takashi rejected her confession.

• Femme Fatale Ikusei Keikaku
 Hiroki is a high school student who is well liked and chubby. After his cute cousin Tsukino is dumped by her ex-boyfriend, Hiroki decides, "I'll become a beautiful woman and make him fall in love with me, and then dump him!" He recruits friends and allies to help him go on a diet and transform into a femme fatale and avenge his cousin.

• Jack the Reaper
 A man wakes up one day in an interrogation room, with no memory of who he is and why he's there. Before him appears a young female detective. She eventually gets angry with the interrogation and storms out, but an intruder comes in and stabs the man to death. The next moment, he's "back" in the interrogation room.

• Marie Antoinette ni Tensei Shita node, Zenryoku de Guillotine wo Kaihi Shimasu
A female otaku from the present day is reincarnated as Marie Antoinette. She refuses to let her future execution play out, so she uses her knowhow as an otaku and her passion to win over the masses — by turning Louis XVI and his brothers into an idol group.

description:
A divine master accidentally fell into the mortal realm, losing all his magical powers. He'd spent millennia trying to unlock the secrets of ascension, only to discover that the first step was to return to earth, starting all over again! The divine master had intended to emulate other cultivators and plunge into arduous cultivation, but who could have imagined that a chef, appearing out of nowhere, would unexpectedly unlock a new path for him to "level up through food." Having lived on spiritual energy and dew since childhood, when had the noble divine master of the Ninth Heaven ever encountered such down-to-earth human delicacies? He loved to eat, to eat more, and to fight over the food! It wasn't until he'd collected every delicacy in the world, with those kneeling before him in submission, that the divine master realized: I'd eaten myself into invincibility!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

description:
Qian Xiao, a cheerful girl from a fishing village, dreams of becoming an actress in the big city. On her way towards the metropolis, a sudden crash changes everything. Fortunately, she survives—and as a bonus, she obtains the Time Dial, a mysterious pendant which gives her the ability to control time. As she excitedly experiments with her newfound power, Qian Xiao becomes the target of a criminal cabal. Seventeen, an assassin from that group, enters her life. What adventure will unfold when a cold-faced, obsessive-compulsive killer and a carefree village girl cross paths?

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

title_romaji: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
title_english: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
description:
The young Qin Feng, hailed as a once-in-a-millennium prodigy in the Wuji Nation, was framed and his entire family was wiped out, leaving him alone. After his martial veins were crippled, he was cast into a small, remote sect to fend for himself. Determined to become stronger and seek revenge, he endured constant bullying, often protected by his kind-hearted Second Senior Sister, who shared a common fate. Unbeknownst to everyone, Qin Feng had already secretly embarked on the arduous path of physical cultivation. Upon learning that three members of his sect were eligible to train at the Tiandao Academy, and with the spots already secured, he broke free from his humiliation. Upon being humiliated once again by the sect's prodigy, Yun Tianyu, he revealed his physical cultivation identity and violently assaulted Yun Tianyu, shocking everyone. Afterwards, he took the initiative, repeatedly teaching Yun Tianyu a lesson, openly challenging the protective Great Elder, and vowing to get a spot in Tiandao Academy, because only in this way could he become stronger. To prevent his apprentice from being humiliated, the two sides finally agreed to a duel in seven days. The winner would receive a spot to practice in Tiandao Academy. During this process, Yun Tianyu broke through the realm and unexpectedly became the Son of God. He was sought after and everyone thought he would win easily. Even the Second Senior Sister tried to persuade him to give up and offered to give him her spot, but Qin Feng refused. In a few days, Qin Feng also received the saint's inheritance. While shouldering the responsibility of saving the human race, he began to secretly practice hellishly.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

description:
Jing Yunxiao was once the supreme Emperor of Samsara on the Dragon Territory Continent. When faced with a conspiracy, he used the Five-Turn Samsara Technique to be reborn as a young man from the Jing family of Hongye Town. Drawing on his past life memories, Jing Yunxiao helped the Jing family overcome the threat of Black Dragon Village, but his grandfather, Jing Yufeng, was also seriously injured.

Desperate, Jing Yunxiao shouldered the responsibility of saving his family and journeyed alone to Huangshi City in search of medicine. Misfortunes never come singly. The Jing family, originally an aristocratic family in the capital of Baizhan Kingdom, retreated to Hongye Town to escape the pursuit of the God of War Palace. Jing Yunxiao's reappearance caught the attention of the God of War Palace. To eliminate the root of the problem, the God of War Palace dispatched the assassin organization, the Dark Feather Palace, to Huangshi City to assassinate Jing Yunxiao.

Meanwhile, Jing Yunxiao, in pursuit of medicine, defeated geniuses from all sides at the Hidden Dragon Competition and bravely entered the Thousand Machines Treasure to win the heart of the icy beauty Mu Shishi. While astonishing everyone with his skills, he also made enemies with many sects. With the sects seeking revenge in front and the Dark Feather Palace hunting behind, how Jing Yunxiao can protect his family and defeat this powerful enemy has become a mystery...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

description:
In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be different. As the adopted son of an aristocratic family, he is forced to embark on the road of a warrior to find the truth and redeem himself. From the four halls of Fengcheng to the struggle between sects, interests are entangled, and powerful enemies lurk. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realizes the power of his bloodline, which not only changes his own destiny, but also affects the future of many people.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

description:
The scientist Chu Feng accidentally obtained the “Jin Wuling” that turned into a meteorite and fell. In order to explore its origin, Chu Feng created a supercomputer “Qiyuan”. With Qiyuan's help, Chu Feng learned that Jin Wuling actually came from a place called Wuhun. The mysterious world of the continent Chu Feng also inadvertently inspired Jin Wuling's power to be transported to Wuhun Continent. In the "Wuhun Continent", Chu Feng rescued Su Manqing, the third young lady of the Su family, but thus became enmity with the Nangong and Lu clans.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

description:
In the vast Jiang Dynasty, the culture of swordsmanship has been passed down for millennia, and the people take pride in practicing it. However, reaching its pinnacle, the "Sword God Realm," is a rare feat. Over a decade ago, the once-powerful Wuji Sword God was severely injured by the schemes of the Changsheng Sword God, forcing him to retreat into seclusion in the mountains, detached from worldly affairs.

Now, Zhan Yibai, Wuji Sword God's only disciple, has finally come of age, and the time has arrived for him to embark on a journey of training as agreed upon by master and disciple. Before departing, to enhance Zhan Yibai's self-defense abilities, Wuji Sword God gifted him his personal sword and instructed him to rapidly achieve the realm of Sword God. New to the secular world, Zhan Yibai befriends Jiang Mingyue, Princess of the dynasty, and Li Kuang, the second son of the Prince of Zhennan. Hoping to rapidly grow, he and his companions participate in the "Ancient Dynasty Ruins" trial, embarking on a remarkable journey.

description:

After meeting the magician Lafi, Ell begins raising her son, Dino, for this purpose. So begins his hardest quest yet, parenthood.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

description:
One month into living on his own, Yi-hyuk was hoping for an exciting, dramatic start to his independent life—but not this kind of drama. What he doesn’t expect is to be tormented by the thunderous noise coming from the apartment next door.

Determined to put an end to it, he confronts his neighbor—only to make things infinitely worse when he accidentally punches him in the face.

Yi-hyuk tries everything—from childish pranks to petty power plays—but his neighbor just won’t budge. He even pleads on his knees to make the noise stop. Just when it seems the feud will never end, they finally manage to call an uneasy truce.

And somewhere along the way, Yi-hyuk realizes he might be falling for the very person who once drove him up the wall.

(Source: Minam)

description:
Movie compilation of the Shibuya Incident Arc from the second season of Jujutsu Kaisen and the first two episodes of the third season's Culling Game Arc.

A veil abruptly descends over the busy Shibuya area amid the bustling Halloween crowds, trapping countless civilians inside. Satoru Gojo, the strongest jujutsu sorcerer, steps into the chaos. But lying in wait are curse users and spirits scheming to seal him away.

Yuji Itadori, accompanied by his classmates and other top-tier jujutsu sorcerers, enters the fray in an unprecedented clash of curses — the Shibuya Incident.

In the aftermath, ten colonies across Japan are transformed into dens of curses in a plan orchestrated by Noritoshi Kamo, the most wicked sorcerer in history. As the deadly Culling Game starts, Special Grade sorcerer Yuta Okkotsu is assigned to carry out Yuji’s execution for his perceived crimes.

(Source: GKIDS)

A little clumsy and always taking things at their own cozy pace,

A sunny warm spot in the park, the sparkle of the sea,

description:
Adapted from the most outstanding collection of Chinese classical short stories.

Pu Songling, a scholar, stays overnight at Lanruo Temple. He is caught by two monsters, Toad and Turtle, and brought to the bottom of an ancient well to judge the quality of his stories.

In a temple, a well, and a tree, classic chapters of Strange Stories, such as The Taoist Priest of Mount Laoshan, Lotus Princess, Nie Xiaoqian, Painted Skin, and Lady Lu, unfold one after another across the vicissitudes of life. Six story styles present an audio-visual feast of the most bizarre stories, the most emotional and the most fateful.

description:
Ordinary life repeats itself every day. The succession of moments that we repeat over and over again is never the same, and everything changes and wavers. The moment we touch something, our consciousness can go to a place that does not exist anywhere in the past, nor in the future. In an uncertain and fluctuating world, only the feeling of the body touching something, which exists only in this present reality, can be recognized as “now”. That moment is lovely.

(Source: YouTube description)

Note: Premiered at the 75th Berlin International Film Festival on February 15, 2025

description:
Dongfang Shaohong, possessing two Dao bodies, but lacking the spiritual roots to awaken his spirit body, is ridiculed by his own clan and even betrayed by his fiancée. Troubles pile up one after another. Dongfang Shaohong's father, imprisoned for possessing the secret to entering the Cangyu Immortal Palace, is trapped by the Immortal Alliance. In the midst of his clan's crisis, Dongfang Shaohong inadvertently uses his own blood to activate the Dao Stone of Immortal Source within him, repelling the Immortal Alliance and saving the clan from the brink. In these dire straits, Dongfang Shaohong is fortunately rescued by his father's friend, Master Ji Yin, and is offered refuge within the Piaomiao Sect. Within the Taiyin Mountain ravine of the Piaomiao Sect, Dongfang Shaohong diligently cultivates, but possessing the Dark Night Dao Body of the Nether Clan is viewed as an anomaly among the human race and constantly harassed by his fellow disciples. Dongfang Shaohong realizes that only by becoming powerful enough can he rescue his father, clear his name, and expose the Immortal Alliance's conspiracy.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

description:
"I came from the wilderness, raised by five incredibly powerful grandparents. To uncover the truth behind my parents' murder, I return to the city."

Watch as this young hero, skilled in martial arts, music, chess, medicine, and cooking, feigns weakness to outsmart others, surrounded by beautiful women, rises against all odds, solves a shocking mystery, and vows to become the city's all-around master, the undisputed ruler of this land!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

Pan Gaofeng, a young rocket development engineer born in the 1980s, joined the First Academy of Aerospace Science and Technology, the cradle of my country's launch vehicles, after graduating from graduate school. He was fortunate to be a member of the development team for the Long March 5 (CZ-5), my country's most powerful launch vehicle. Working alongside his predecessors and colleagues, he overcame numerous difficulties, overcame obstacles, and defied external ridicule and skepticism. He rose from the ashes of a failed launch to ultimately achieve success, marking a crucial step in my country's transition from a major space power to a leading space power.

Tall, blonde and blue-eyed, it is impossible not to notice Isak Borg, First Secretary to the Swedish Embassy in Pyongyang. As a diplomat, he is under constant surveillance and strongly discouraged from interacting with the locals. Despite this, he secretly dates Bok-joo, a local traffic officer, but when one last effort to extend his stay is rejected, Isak begs her to come back to Stockholm with him. Bok-joo turns this idea down and abruptly disappears. Oblivious to the danger he is putting the woman he loves in, Isak asks Myeong-jun, his assigned interpreter, for help. When Myeong-jun refuses, a desperate Isak becomes increasingly suspicious of everyone.

(Source: Tribeca Film)

title_romaji: Kanojo ga Separate wo Matou Riyuu
title_english: Kanojo ga Separate wo Matou Riyuu
title_native: 彼女がセパレートをまとう理由
description:
Amane Kujou, a virgin girl frustrated with her chaste boyfriend who only kisses her, channels her energy into the track and field club. However, her strong sexual desire, typical of an athlete, fuels her growing frustration. To make matters worse, a middle-aged man can’t stop staring at her provocative athletic uniform.

Living alone in an apartment, Amane indulges in nightly masturbation. Unbeknownst to her, the middle-aged landlord secretly records her behavior!

In exchange for deleting the videos, he demands a one-sided physical relationship.

Though unwanted, Amane’s unsatisfied body begins to crave the man’s touch more and more… What will become of Amane?!

title_english: Di Ling Ai: Mo Shui Linglong
description:
All things possess a spirit, and the power of nature coalesced into various conscious fairies. However, due to humanity's neglect of nature and the awakening of suppressed powers, the fairies have been harmed. A human girl encounters a fairy from the depths of the water and they have known each other for many years. However, they cannot overcome the barrier between celestial and mortal. On a wondrous journey, the girl resolves to find her own power. She believes that humanity is also part of nature, and that there must be a way for humans and nature to coexist harmoniously. Can she protect nature?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

description:
Woo-Ri’s 5-year old poodle mix, Maru, has turned into a human — a 5-year old little girl, that is! Now Woo-Ri’s gone from pet owner to big sister, and it’s her job to keep Maru out of trouble. Human Maru has the same endless curiosity and playfulness of a puppy, but now she can walk into grocery stores, go to kindergarten, and check this out — hold things with her opposable thumbs. Being human rules!

description:
The story takes place in a world where human civilization has collapsed and fallen into ruin.
In this world, there are people who live in groups and people who live individually, moving around. – a world of freedom, so to speak.
Two girls, Haru and Tamo, who live in such a world, board an old train they come across by chance and travel through the decadent world day by day.

(Source: Niigata International Animation Film Festival)

Notes:
- Initially pre-screened at the Niigata International Animation Film Festival on March 15, 2025, as well as at the Fantasia Film Festival on July 19, 2025.
- Selected for the Fantasia Film Festival Anime no Bento official selection highlighting indie talent, as well as winning the audience award and gold award in the Animated Short category at the Fantasia Film Festival 2025.
